_meta.description: R3 local MCP server registrations for VS Code. Paste the 'servers' block into MCP: Open User Configuration.
_meta.prerequisite: All three servers must be running before VS Code registers the MCP connections. Start with: node SOURCE/chat-legs/server.js (ports 8420+8421) and the control-plane server (8422).

r3-chatlegs-primary._comment: Primary AI chat proxy — chatlegs port 8420
